landing.heroDesc: Build visual processing pipelines with a node-based editor. Resize, crop, compress, and convert 100s of images at once. Nothing leaves your device.
landing.featureBatchDesc: Process hundreds of images in one click with a visual node pipeline
landing.featurePrivacyDesc: All processing happens in your browser. Images never leave your device.
landing.featureNodeEditorDesc: Drag and drop nodes to build processing pipelines visually
landing.ctaDesc: No signup required. Free for basic use.

pricing.title: Simple Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Pay once, use forever. No subscriptions.

cryptoModal.title: Pay with Crypto
cryptoModal.checkingDesc: Verifying via TronScan and Trongrid. This may take up to 2 minutes.
cryptoModal.notFound: Transaction not found. Check the TxID, amount, and recipient address.
cryptoModal.timeout: Verification is taking longer than expected. Your transaction may still be pending on the network. You can close this window and check your activation status later.
cryptoModal.comeBackLater: You can also close this window and come back to check later.
cryptoModal.wrongAmount: Sent the wrong amount or network? Contact us with your TxID to resolve it.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Image Pipeline.
faq.openIssue: Open an issue on GitHub and we'll help.
faq.q1a: Upload your images, build a pipeline by connecting nodes on the canvas (e.g. Load → Crop → Export), then click Process. Every image runs through the same pipeline. The outputs are collected into a single ZIP file for download.
faq.q2: What are the free tier limits?
faq.q2a: Free tier allows up to 10 files per batch, 4 nodes per pipeline, and 10 processing batches per day. Usage resets daily. Upgrade to Pro for unlimited access.
faq.q3: How do I pay with USDT (TRC-20)?
faq.q3a: Go to the Pricing page and select Pro or Lifetime. Copy the USDT (TRC-20) wallet address, send the exact amount, then paste the transaction ID (TxID) in the confirmation modal. Your account upgrades automatically once the transaction is verified via TronScan.
faq.q4a: Input: JPEG, PNG, WebP, AVIF, GIF, BMP, TIFF. Output (via the Export node): PNG, JPEG, WebP, AVIF. The Compress and Format nodes let you convert between formats and adjust quality.
faq.q5a: Yes. All image processing happens entirely in your browser. Your files are never uploaded to any server — nothing leaves your device. Usage counters are stored locally and synced anonymously with our server only for rate limiting.
faq.q6: Can I use the editor without an account?
faq.q6a: Yes. No signup, no email, no account needed. Just open the editor and start building pipelines.
faq.q7: What does each pipeline node do?
faq.q7a: Load — entry point for your images; Resize — change dimensions; Crop — cut a region; Compress — reduce file size; Format — convert format; Watermark — add text overlay; Denoise — reduce noise; Rename — set output filenames; Export — final output settings. Connect them in any order.
faq.q8: How do I connect nodes in the pipeline?
faq.q8a: Each node has circular handles on its sides. Drag from the output handle (right side) of one node to the input handle (left side) of another. A disconnected node is skipped during processing.
faq.q9: What happens if a node fails?
faq.q9a: Processing continues for the remaining files. Failed files are marked with an error status. You can see the error message in the completion dialog after processing finishes.
faq.q10: Can I share my pipeline with someone?
faq.q10a: Yes. After building a pipeline, click the Share button in the editor header. You'll get a link that expires after 7 days. Anyone with the link can load the pipeline into their own editor.
faq.q11a: Lifetime costs $30 USDT (one-time). It never expires and includes all features of Pro. No recurring payments, no subscriptions.
faq.q12: How long does USDT verification take?
faq.q12a: Once you submit the transaction ID (TxID), verification typically completes within a few seconds. In rare cases, it may take up to a minute depending on TronScan availability.

processing.freeLimitDesc: You've used all your free slots. Upgrade to Pro for unlimited processing.

onboarding.step1Desc: Let's walk through the basics in 30 seconds.
onboarding.step2Desc: Start by dragging images into the Files tab.
onboarding.step3Desc: Drag nodes from the palette to the canvas and connect them.
onboarding.step4Desc: Click a node to adjust its settings in the panel.
onboarding.step5Desc: Click Process to run your pipeline on all images.
onboarding.step6Desc: Download the results as a ZIP file.

cookie.title: Cookie Consent
cookie.desc: We use minimal cookies and local storage for essential functionality (usage limits, pipeline drafts) and anonymous analytics to improve the service. No tracking cookies are used.
